name: chain
description: Linear dependency chain: each job must complete before the next can start.

jobs.title: Set up development environment
jobs.body: Install dependencies, configure tooling, verify the build works end-to-end.

jobs.title: Design database schema
jobs.body: Define tables, indexes, and migration strategy. Must happen after setup.

jobs.title: Implement REST API
jobs.body: Build CRUD endpoints on top of the schema. Requires schema to be finalised.

jobs.title: Write integration tests
jobs.body: Cover happy-path and error cases for every endpoint.
